_meta.source: machine unlock tiers from JoeJoesGit/AlchemyFactoryCalculator (Jan 2026); machine tiers are structural and were not touched by the June recipe-balance patch, so treated as current for 0.5.0.4471
_meta.note: Advanced Cauldron/portals absent from source — defaulted (portals 0 = always available, Advanced Cauldron 8 = guess). Used to derive effective item unlock tiers for recipe gating.
